title: Create Numismatics Craft
description: This mod adds craft to the create addon : Create Numismatics.
body:
This mod adds craft to the create addon : Create Numismatics.

You need to have the Create & Create Numismatics Mods Installed.

Feature: You also have an unpolished version of the coins.

 

Craft:
Spur: Copper Nugget (x1) + Cogwheel (x1)

Bevel: Crushed Raw Zinc (x1) + Cogwheel (x1)

Sprocket: Iron Sheet (x1) + Large Cogwheel (x1)

Cog: Brass Ingot (x1) + Large Cogwheel (x1)

Crown:  Gold Block (x1) + Large Cogwheel (x1)

Sun: Crown / Unpolished Crown (x1) + Netherite Block (x1) + Large Cogwheel (x1)

 

All these items can be crafted using a crafting table or a mixer.

Important note: When you craft it with a mixer, you get an unpolished coin that you need to wash to use it.
